initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    c.c_customer_id
FROM 
    customer c
    JOIN store_sales ss ON c.c_customer_sk = ss.ss_customer_sk
    JOIN catalog_sales cs ON c.c_customer_sk = cs.cs_bill_customer_sk
    JOIN date_dim d1 ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
    JOIN date_dim d2 ON cs.cs_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
WHERE 
    d1.d_year = 2000 
    AND d2.d_year = 2000
GROUP BY 
    c.c_customer_id, c.c_customer_sk
HAVING 
    SUM(cs.cs_ext_list_price - cs.cs_ext_discount_amt) > SUM(ss.ss_ext_list_price - ss.ss_ext_discount_amt)
ORDER BY 
    c.c_customer_id ASC
LIMIT 100

SELECT c_customer_id
FROM customer
JOIN store_sales ON customer.c_customer_sk = store_sales.ss_customer_sk
JOIN catalog_sales ON customer.c_customer_sk = catalog_sales.cs_bill_customer_sk
JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
WHERE date_dim.d_year = 2000
GROUP BY c_customer_id, c_customer_sk
HAVING SUM(catalog_sales.cs_ext_list_price - catalog_sales.cs_ext_discount_amt) > 
       SUM(store_sales.ss_ext_list_price - store_sales.ss_ext_discount_amt)
ORDER BY c_customer_id ASC
LIMIT 100;

SELECT c.c_customer_id
FROM customer c
JOIN store_sales ss ON c.c_customer_sk = ss.ss_customer_sk
JOIN catalog_sales cs ON c.c_customer_sk = cs.cs_bill_customer_sk
JOIN date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk AND cs.cs_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
WHERE d.d_year = 2000
GROUP BY c.c_customer_id, c.c_customer_sk
HAVING SUM(cs.cs_ext_list_price - cs.cs_ext_discount_amt) > SUM(ss.ss_ext_list_price - ss.ss_ext_discount_amt)
ORDER BY c.c_customer_id ASC
LIMIT 100;

SELECT 
    c_customer_id
FROM 
    customer
    JOIN store_sales ON customer.c_customer_sk = store_sales.ss_customer_sk
    JOIN catalog_sales ON customer.c_customer_sk = catalog_sales.cs_bill_customer_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
WHERE 
    date_dim.d_year = 2000
GROUP BY 
    c_customer_id, c_customer_sk
HAVING 
    SUM(catalog_sales.cs_ext_list_price - catalog_sales.cs_ext_discount_amt) > 
    SUM(store_sales.ss_ext_list_price - store_sales.ss_ext_discount_amt)
ORDER BY 
    c_customer_id ASC
LIMIT 100;

SELECT 
    c_customer_id
FROM 
    customer
    JOIN store_sales ON customer.c_customer_sk = store_sales.ss_customer_sk
    JOIN catalog_sales ON customer.c_customer_sk = catalog_sales.cs_bill_customer_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
WHERE 
    date_dim.d_year = 2000
GROUP BY 
    customer.c_customer_id, customer.c_customer_sk
HAVING 
    SUM(catalog_sales.cs_ext_list_price - catalog_sales.cs_ext_discount_amt) > 
    SUM(store_sales.ss_ext_list_price - store_sales.ss_ext_discount_amt)
ORDER BY 
    customer.c_customer_id ASC
LIMIT 100

aggregation.selected_sql:
WITH store_totals AS (
  SELECT 
    c_customer_sk,
    c_customer_id,
    SUM(ss_ext_list_price - ss_ext_discount_amt) AS store_total
  FROM 
    customer
    JOIN store_sales ON customer.c_customer_sk = store_sales.ss_customer_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  WHERE 
    date_dim.d_year = 2000
  GROUP BY 
    c_customer_sk, c_customer_id
),
catalog_totals AS (
  SELECT 
    c_customer_sk,
    c_customer_id,
    SUM(cs_ext_list_price - cs_ext_discount_amt) AS catalog_total
  FROM 
    customer
    JOIN catalog_sales ON customer.c_customer_sk = catalog_sales.cs_bill_customer_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  WHERE 
    date_dim.d_year = 2000
  GROUP BY 
    c_customer_sk, c_customer_id
)
SELECT 
  c.c_customer_id
FROM 
  customer c
  INNER JOIN store_totals s ON c.c_customer_sk = s.c_customer_sk
  INNER JOIN catalog_totals ct ON c.c_customer_sk = ct.c_customer_sk
WHERE 
  ct.catalog_total > s.store_total
ORDER BY 
  c.c_customer_id ASC
LIMIT 100

candidates.sql:
WITH store_totals AS (
  SELECT ss_customer_sk, SUM(ss_ext_list_price - ss_ext_discount_amt) AS store_total
  FROM store_sales
  JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
  WHERE d_year = 2000
  GROUP BY ss_customer_sk
),
catalog_totals AS (
  SELECT cs_bill_customer_sk, SUM(cs_ext_list_price - cs_ext_discount_amt) AS catalog_total
  FROM catalog_sales
  JOIN date_dim ON cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
  WHERE d_year = 2000
  GROUP BY cs_bill_customer_sk
)
SELECT c.c_customer_id
FROM customer c
JOIN store_totals st ON c.c_customer_sk = st.ss_customer_sk
JOIN catalog_totals ct ON c.c_customer_sk = ct.cs_bill_customer_sk
WHERE ct.catalog_total > st.store_total
ORDER BY c.c_customer_id ASC
LIMIT 100

WITH store_totals AS (
  SELECT 
    ss.ss_customer_sk,
    SUM(ss.ss_ext_list_price - ss.ss_ext_discount_amt) AS store_total
  FROM store_sales ss
  JOIN date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
  WHERE d.d_year = 2000
  GROUP BY ss.ss_customer_sk
),
catalog_totals AS (
  SELECT 
    cs.cs_bill_customer_sk,
    SUM(cs.cs_ext_list_price - cs.cs_ext_discount_amt) AS catalog_total
  FROM catalog_sales cs
  JOIN date_dim d ON cs.cs_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
  WHERE d.d_year = 2000
  GROUP BY cs.cs_bill_customer_sk
)
SELECT 
  c.c_customer_id
FROM customer c
JOIN store_totals st ON c.c_customer_sk = st.ss_customer_sk
JOIN catalog_totals ct ON c.c_customer_sk = ct.cs_bill_customer_sk
WHERE ct.catalog_total > st.store_total
ORDER BY c.c_customer_id ASC
LIMIT 100;

WITH store_totals AS (
    SELECT 
        c_customer_sk,
        c_customer_id,
        SUM(ss_ext_list_price - ss_ext_discount_amt) AS store_total
    FROM 
        customer
        JOIN store_sales ON customer.c_customer_sk = store_sales.ss_customer_sk
        JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    WHERE 
        date_dim.d_year = 2000
    GROUP BY 
        c_customer_sk, c_customer_id
),
catalog_totals AS (
    SELECT 
        c_customer_sk,
        c_customer_id,
        SUM(cs_ext_list_price - cs_ext_discount_amt) AS catalog_total
    FROM 
        customer
        JOIN catalog_sales ON customer.c_customer_sk = catalog_sales.cs_bill_customer_sk
        JOIN date_dim ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    WHERE 
        date_dim.d_year = 2000
    GROUP BY 
        c_customer_sk, c_customer_id
)
SELECT 
    c.c_customer_id
FROM 
    customer c
    INNER JOIN store_totals s ON c.c_customer_sk = s.c_customer_sk
    INNER JOIN catalog_totals ct ON c.c_customer_sk = ct.c_customer_sk
WHERE 
    ct.catalog_total > s.store_total
ORDER BY 
    c.c_customer_id ASC
LIMIT 100

  INNER JOIN catalog_totals ct ON c.c_customer_sk = ct.c_customer_sk
WHERE

ORDER BY
